description: ABCC11 variant - highly informative for East Asian, Native American, and Oceanian populations.
Melanesian Specific Marker - diagnostic for the unique genetic lineages of the Bismarck Archipelago and Solomon Islands.
Maori Ancestry Marker - informative for Polynesian populations from New Zealand.
Fijian Ancestry Marker - informative for populations from Fiji.
Tongan Ancestry Marker - informative for populations from Tonga.
Tahitian Ancestry Marker - informative for populations from Tahiti.
Cook Islander Ancestry Marker - informative for populations from the Cook Islands.
Papuan Ancestry Marker - informative for indigenous populations of New Guinea.
Aboriginal Australian Marker - diagnostic for ancient Sahul genetic signatures.
Samoan Ancestry Marker - informative for western Polynesian populations.
Melanesian Ancestry Marker - informative for populations from Vanuatu and the Solomon Islands.
Micronesian Ancestry Marker - informative for populations of the Mariana and Caroline Islands.
OCE/EAS Tie-Breaker - Deep Sahul lineage marker, strongly filters out Austronesian/East Asian overlap.
OCE/AFR Tie-Breaker - Denisovan-introgressed lineage marker, entirely absent in Sub-Saharan Africa.
OCE/AMR Tie-Breaker - Deep Sahul lineage, effectively absent in indigenous populations of the Americas.
Oceanian Tie-Breaker - Highly specific to Melanesian and Papuan populations.
Oceanian Tie-Breaker - Informative for Australasian genetic signatures.
Oceanian Diagnostic Marker - highly informative for identifying indigenous ancestry in the Pacific.
